text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Die Cramerischen Herren Erben und Gebr\\u221a\\u00bader Philibert, Buchf\\u221a\\u00bahrere in Genff, proponiren dem Publico Subscriptions-Weis, eine neue Edition von <BIBL><AUTHOR>M. T. Ciccronis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Operibus</TITLE>, cum Delectu Commentariorum \\u221a\\u2020 <AUTHOR>Josepho dOlivet</AUTHOR>, in sch\\u221a\\u2202n Pappier mit neuer Schrifft, von St. Augustini Text und Garamondi Noten; in conformit\\u221a\\u00a7t der Pariser Edition sehr correct heraus zugeben, und versprechen solches von allen darinn sich befindlichen Fehleren zu reinigen \\u00cd\\u00f9\\u00f5c. das gantze Werck, welches in <FORMAT>4t\\u221a\\u2264</FORMAT> <VOLUME>9. Volumina</VOLUME> haltet, solle die Herren Praenumeranten nicht mehr als <PRICE>67 Livres Frantz\\u221a\\u2202sische Valuta</PRICE> oder <PRICE>40. Francken Genffer-Geld</PRICE> kosten \\u00cd\\u00f9\\u00f5c. das weitere kan aus dem Project und Aviso bey Herrn Onoffrio Hoffmann allhier ersehen werden.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1) Fixed the mismatched tag: the first price was opened as <PRIZE> but closed as </PRICE>; standardized both price tags to <PRICE>...</PRICE> to be consistent and well-formed. 2) Changed the opening tag <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for the first price element. 3) Changed the opening tag <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for the second price element (it had been closed with </PRIZE>). 4) Added a missing space in 'PublicoSubscriptions-Weis' -> 'Publico Subscriptions-Weis' and in 'M. T.Ciccronis' -> 'M. T. Ciccronis' for readability. All other tags (ITEM, BIBL, AUTHOR, TITLE, FORMAT, VOLUME) were already correctly opened and closed and were left unchanged."}
